lines.text: Your letter was received on April 3rd.

In response to your request for information from FBI files regarding your activities in the unidentified flying objects research field, please be advised that we have no such information in our files except copies of prior correspondence with you and a record of your September 17, 1963, interview. Therefore, we have no documents to send to you and cannot further comply with your request.

NOTE: Bufiles reflect prior correspondence with [REDACTED] regard-ing UFO's of which copies have been made and are being furnished to him. Data pertaining to the interview is contained in an incoming airtel from Norfolk dated 9/24/63. SA [REDACTED] of the Norfolk Office was contacted and apparently the interview of [REDACTED] in 1963 was initiated because of voluminous correspon-dence which [REDACTED] had sent to Federal and military as well as law enforcement agencies.
-I'T's a lot of text, but I'll do my best to transcribe it.
